ntc_init.message0: NTC thermal temperature sensor connected to pin %1 Reference resistance %2Ω Nominal resistance %3Ω Nominal temperature %4°C B value %5
ntc_init.tooltip: Initialize NTC thermal temperature sensor, set pins and parameters

ntc_read_fahrenheit.message0: Read NTC Fahrenheit temperature from pin %1

ntc_read_kelvin.message0: Read NTC Kelvin temperature from pin %1
ntc_read_kelvin.tooltip: Read the Kelvin temperature value of the NTC sensor
